data.title: A whale is selling 6.25 million Fartcoin and 10 million POPCAT with DCA
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale is selling 6.25 million Fartcoins (US$5.53 million) and 10 million POPCATs (US$2.68 million) through the DCA strategy.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF Sees Significant Outflow in the U.S.
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent monitoring by Farside indicates that the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF experienced a net outflow of $6 million. Within this, the FETH saw a net outflow of $7.8 million.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of US$1.4705 million yesterday, with only BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF IBIT achieving net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 14, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$1.4705 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock Bitcoin ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of US$36.7179 million. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$39.604 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC, with a single-day net outflow of US$35.2475 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$11.370 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$94.692 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) reached 5.62%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$35.360 billion.

data.title: 91 central banks around the world have no digital asset investments, and more than half oppose Bitcoin strategic reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News A recent survey on central bank cryptocurrency reserves showed a mixed picture. Currently, 91 central banks that manage more than $7 trillion in reserves have no digital asset investments. Only one central bank expressed support for the idea of ​​a strategic Bitcoin reserve, 50 central banks (59.5%) opposed it, and 33 (39.3%) were uncertain. In addition, last year 15.9% of central bank respondents said they would consider investing in digital assets or digital currencies in the next five to ten years, but this proportion dropped sharply to only 2.1% in the 2025 survey.

data.title: Eric Trump to Attend TOKEN2049 Conference in Dubai
data.description: According to PANews, TOKEN2049 has announced that Eric Trump, the second son of U.S. President Donald Trump, will be attending the TOKEN2049 conference in Dubai. The event is scheduled to take place from April 30 to May 1, 2025.

data.title: Ethereum's EigenLayer to Launch Slashing Mechanism on Mainnet
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Ethereum's restaking protocol EigenLayer has announced that its slashing mechanism will be launched on the mainnet on April 17. This update will enable Active Verification Services (AVS) to develop verifiable and trustless applications. Additionally, operators and stakers will be held accountable for their actions.

Slashing is a method used in Proof of Stake (PoS) protocols to economically penalize a node or group of nodes for executing strategies that deviate from the specified protocol guidelines.

data.title: South Korea Blocks Apps of Crypto Exchanges on Apple, Google Stores
data.description:
Google and Apple pulled apps, including KuCoin and MEXC, after authorities flagged them for operating without proper registration.
source: https://decrypt.co/314786/south-korea-blocks-apps-crypto-exchanges-apple-google-stores

data.title: Deadline Approaches for Terra Cryptocurrency Loss Claims
data.description: According to PANews, Terra has issued a reminder on the X platform regarding the deadline for submitting cryptocurrency loss claims to the Terraform Labs Pte. Ltd. liquidation trust fund. Creditors must file their eligible claims by May 16, 2025, at 23:59 ET (UTC+8: May 17, 2025, at 11:59). Claims submitted after this deadline will not be accepted.

data.title: Terra: Deadline to submit loss claims to the Terraform Liquidation Trust is May 17
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Terra officials issued a reminder on the X platform that the deadline for submitting cryptocurrency loss claims to the Terraform Labs Pte. Ltd. Liquidation Trust Fund is 23:59 ET on May 16, 2025 (11:59 Beijing time on May 17, 2025). Creditors must submit their eligible cryptocurrency loss claims before this date. Late submissions will not be accepted.

data.title: Binance Whales Defying Selloff Trend? Crucial Onchain Data Says THIS about Crypto Market
data.description:
The crypto market still faces macroeconomic uncertainty despite showing the potential for a bullish rebound. Meanwhile, Binance whales are in the spotlight as they defy market expectations. Onchain analytics data provider CryptoQuant illuminated the behavior of Binance whales to provide general sentiment in the crypto market
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/14/binance-whales-defying-selloff-trend-crucial-onchain-data-says-this-about-crypto-market/
